name: litespeed_up
definition: Server health check: 1 = LiteSpeed process is running and .rtreport is readable; 0 = exporter cannot reach LiteSpeed
absence_means: LiteSpeed process is down or exporter is not running

name: litespeed_current_http_connections
definition: Current number of active plain HTTP (non-SSL) connections; pre-computed snapshot gauge updated every ~10 s by LiteSpeed
absence_means: No plain HTTP traffic or exporter not running

name: litespeed_maximum_http_connections
definition: Configured maximum concurrent plain HTTP connections (MAXCONN); static configuration value; used as denominator for utilization ratio
absence_means: Configuration not exposed or exporter not running

name: litespeed_available_connections
definition: Available plain HTTP connection slots (MAXCONN minus active); drops toward 0 as connection pool fills; key saturation indicator
absence_means: Connection pool fully exhausted or exporter not running

name: litespeed_current_idle_connections
definition: Connections open but not actively processing a request (keep-alive); high value is normal keep-alive behavior; not a saturation signal on its own
absence_means: No keep-alive connections or exporter not running

name: litespeed_current_ssl_connections
definition: Current number of active SSL/TLS connections; covers HTTP/1.1+TLS HTTP/2 and HTTP/3/QUIC traffic — all encrypted traffic regardless of protocol version
absence_means: No SSL traffic or exporter not running

name: litespeed_maximum_ssl_connections
definition: Configured maximum concurrent SSL connections (MAXSSL_CONN); static configuration value; used as denominator for SSL utilization ratio
absence_means: SSL configuration not exposed or exporter not running

name: litespeed_available_ssl_connections
definition: Available SSL connection slots (MAXSSL_CONN minus active); key SSL saturation indicator
absence_means: SSL pool fully exhausted or exporter not running

name: litespeed_incoming_http_bytes_per_second
definition: Inbound plain HTTP bandwidth in bytes per second; pre-computed rate gauge — do NOT apply rate() or per-second post-function
absence_means: No plain HTTP inbound traffic

name: litespeed_outgoing_http_bytes_per_second
definition: Outbound plain HTTP bandwidth in bytes per second; pre-computed rate gauge
absence_means: No plain HTTP outbound traffic

name: litespeed_incoming_ssl_bytes_per_second
definition: Inbound SSL/TLS bandwidth in bytes per second (covers HTTP/2 and HTTP/3); pre-computed rate gauge
absence_means: No SSL inbound traffic

name: litespeed_outgoing_ssl_bytes_per_second
definition: Outbound SSL/TLS bandwidth in bytes per second (covers HTTP/2 and HTTP/3); pre-computed rate gauge
absence_means: No SSL outbound traffic

name: litespeed_requests_per_second_per_vhost
definition: Request rate per virtual host in requests per second; pre-computed rate gauge updated every ~10 s — do NOT apply rate() or per-second
absence_means: VHost has received no traffic since server start or exporter not running
cardinality_footguns: Medium — one series per vhost (20-100 typical); use Top-N

name: litespeed_total_requests_per_vhost
definition: Cumulative total requests per virtual host since server start; true Prometheus counter — apply rate() for rate-of-change
absence_means: VHost never received traffic or exporter not running
cardinality_footguns: Medium — one series per vhost; use Top-N

name: litespeed_current_requests_per_vhost
definition: Number of requests currently in-flight (being processed) per virtual host; high sustained value indicates slow backends or cache bypass
absence_means: No in-flight requests or vhost inactive

name: litespeed_outgoing_bytes_per_second_per_vhost
definition: Outbound bandwidth per virtual host in bytes per second; pre-computed rate gauge; useful for isolating high-traffic vhosts
absence_means: No outbound traffic from this vhost

name: litespeed_public_cache_hits_per_second_per_vhost
definition: LSCache public (shared) cache hits per second per virtual host; pre-computed rate gauge; zero if LSCache not configured or not warmed
absence_means: LSCache not configured for this VHost or cache not yet warmed after restart

name: litespeed_public_cache_hits_per_vhost
definition: Cumulative public cache hits per virtual host since server start; true Prometheus counter; use rate() for rate-of-change
absence_means: LSCache not configured for VHost

name: litespeed_private_cache_hits_per_second_per_vhost
definition: LSCache private (per-user/session) cache hits per second per virtual host; pre-computed rate gauge; relevant for CMS with logged-in users
absence_means: No logged-in user traffic or private cache not enabled

name: litespeed_private_cache_hits_per_vhost
definition: Cumulative private cache hits per virtual host since server start; true Prometheus counter
absence_means: No logged-in user traffic or private cache disabled

name: litespeed_static_hits_per_second_per_vhost
definition: Static file serving rate per second per virtual host (JS/CSS/images served directly without PHP); pre-computed rate gauge
absence_means: VHost serves no static files or static serving disabled

name: litespeed_static_hits_per_vhost
definition: Cumulative static file hits per virtual host since server start; true Prometheus counter
absence_means: No static files served or metric not exposed

name: litespeed_config_max_connections_per_app
definition: Configured maximum connections to an EXTAPP backend pool (CMAXCONN); static configuration ceiling per app type and name
absence_means: No external application configured for this VHost
cardinality_footguns: Low — bounded by app_type and app_name count

name: litespeed_pool_max_connections_per_app
definition: Effective pool maximum connections (EMAXCONN); may differ from CMAXCONN due to dynamic pool scaling; used as denominator for pool utilization
absence_means: No external application configured

name: litespeed_pool_count_per_app
definition: Number of active worker processes/threads in the EXTAPP pool (POOL_SIZE); drops when workers crash; watch for sudden drops paired with high INUSE_CONN
absence_means: No workers spawned yet (lazy init) or all workers crashed

name: litespeed_connections_in_use_per_app
definition: Currently in-use connections to an EXTAPP backend (INUSE_CONN); when equal to EMAXCONN the pool is fully saturated
absence_means: No active backend requests

name: litespeed_connections_idle_per_app
definition: Idle connections in the EXTAPP pool (IDLE_CONN); when 0 with WAITQUE_DEPTH > 0 all workers are busy
absence_means: All workers crashed or pool not initialized

name: litespeed_wait_queue_depth_per_app
definition: Requests waiting for an available EXTAPP connection (WAITQUE_DEPTH); any value > 0 means backend is saturated and requests are queuing — the most critical saturation metric
absence_means: No backend pressure (healthy state)
cardinality_footguns: Low — bounded by app count; use max aggregation

name: litespeed_requests_per_second_per_app
definition: Backend request throughput per EXTAPP in requests per second; pre-computed rate gauge — do NOT apply rate()
absence_means: No requests dispatched to this backend

name: litespeed_total_requests_per_app
definition: Cumulative total requests dispatched to an EXTAPP backend since server start; true Prometheus counter — apply rate()
absence_means: No requests ever dispatched to this backend

name: litespeed_current_l4_connections
definition: Current L4 passthrough connections in Kubernetes LiteSpeed Ingress Controller mode; NOT present in standard deployments
absence_means: K8s Ingress Controller not in use (absent in standard LSWS)

name: litespeed_incoming_l4_bytes_per_second
definition: L4 passthrough inbound bandwidth; Kubernetes Ingress Controller only; pre-computed rate gauge
absence_means: K8s Ingress Controller not in use

name: litespeed_outgoing_l4_bytes_per_second
definition: L4 passthrough outbound bandwidth; Kubernetes Ingress Controller only; pre-computed rate gauge
absence_means: K8s Ingress Controller not in use

name: NOT_APPLICABLE
definition: LiteSpeed does not expose billing or cost metrics. Use litespeed_outgoing_http_bytes_per_second + litespeed_outgoing_ssl_bytes_per_second as egress proxy for network cost estimation. Backend PHP worker pool utilization (litespeed_connections_in_use_per_app) can serve as a compute cost proxy.
absence_means: No cost metrics available
